From udacity/udemy/coursera/MIT open course etc
Eg CS50 from Harvard

跟住你可以報programmer/developer/software engineering 試下

通常大家都係先反3-6 months internship
After that, you can apply permanent job with at least 17k/mon

Feel free to ask me vis telegram @diwbdjs to know more

MIT我整合左d courses:

In order to study Data structures and Algorithm

Introduction to Electrical Engineering and Computer Science I
(There are 2 courses)
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-01sc-introduction-to-electrical-engineering-and-computer-science-i-spring-2011/

Single Variable Calculus
18.01
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/mathematics/18-01-single-variable-calculus-fall-2006/

Mathematics for Computer Science
6.042J
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-042j-mathematics-for-computer-science-fall-2010/

Introduction to Algorithms
6.006
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-006-introduction-to-algorithms-fall-2011/


Design and Analysis of Algorithms
6.046J
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-046j-design-and-analysis-of-algorithms-spring-2015/index.htm
_____
To study computer organization
Physics I: Classical Mechanics
8.01L
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/physics/8-01l-physics-i-classical-mechanics-fall-2005/index.htm

Physics II: Electricity and Magnetism
8.02
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/physics/8-02-physics-ii-electricity-and-magnetism-spring-2007/index.htm

Multivariable Calculus
18.02
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/mathematics/18-02-multivariable-calculus-spring-2006/index.htm

Differential Equations
18.03
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/mathematics/18-03sc-differential-equations-fall-2011/

Circuits and Electronics
6.002
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-002-circuits-and-electronics-spring-2007/

Computation Structures
6.004
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2009/

Computer System Engineering
6.033
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-033-computer-system-engineering-spring-2009/index.htm

_____
To study gaming

Creating Video Games
CMS.611J / 6.073
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/comparative-media-studies-writing/cms-611j-creating-video-games-fall-2014/index.htm

_____
To study
AI/machine learning

Introduction To MATLAB Programming
18.S997
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/mathematics/18-s997-introduction-to-matlab-programming-fall-2011/index.htm

Artificial Intelligence
6.034
https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-034-artificial-intelligence-fall-2010/index.htm

yes已經講完
英文唔好你更加無能力做programmer
上面有人串你google都唔識唔洗做programmer其實係好中肯
因為大把野你要google靠自己摸掂佢
而多數都係外國先有咁多資源搵
中文係少90%以上
其實上面果個講咁多course
我淨推薦你讀一個，唔洗錢既，edx既cs50
有教programming最基本概念，由零教起
講師係harvard既computer science 既professor
我都有take呢個course，professor講野超級容易明，勁過local u十九幾皮，哈彿真係哈彿
but如果你連呢個course都上唔掂，算9數啦
你要做既係學好d英文唔係學乜人做programmer
利申我做support做到itm，50k，唔算高but一定已經好過唔少人，我30
原因都係因為英文好，你覺得support做到隻狗咁係因為你英文差唔係因為support係隻狗= =

香港做programming同support都係一樣冇乜前途啦
趁後生轉到行就轉啦

senior 4x大有人在
或者有ibank經驗後自己係出面揾返inHouse都已經高好多
